description:
Hunyuan Image 2.1 is a high quality, highly efficient text-to-image model. Send a prompt to generate an image. 

Optional parameters:
Aspect Ratio (one of `16:9`, `4:3`, `1:1`, `3:4`, `9:16`) to set the aspect ratio of the generated image.
Negative prompt (examples: blur, low resolution, poor quality) to set negative prompt on the image generated.

Notes: This bot does not accept attachment.
